category_title: Students who become bored and disruptive or sleepy during constant lecturing
scenario_title: Constant dictation and lecturing for over 20 minutes
minimal_context: The student is participating in an algebra class where the teacher is dictating notes for over 20 minutes.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please copy down the next set of algebra rules as I dictate them to you.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Yawns) You just tell and tell and tell... we only dictate even in algebra.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep writing what I am saying.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Puts head on desk) It's been 20 minutes of just focusing on the course, I feel sleepy.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Sit up and focus on the algebra.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Hey, did anyone watch the game last night? I'm bored.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please copy down the next set of algebra rules as I dictate them to you.

STUDENT: (Yawns) You just tell and tell and tell... we only dictate even in algebra.

TUTOR: Just keep writing what I am saying.

STUDENT: (Puts head on desk) It's been 20 minutes of just focusing on the course, I feel sleepy.

TUTOR: Sit up and focus on the algebra.

STUDENT: Hey, did anyone watch the game last night? I'm bored.

task.content: Participating in an algebra class characterized by constant lecturing and dictation without student interaction.

context.social_setting: teacher focuses exclusively on the course content

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: all of the students feel sleepy after 20 minutes, apart from some few in the front, the rest sleeps
related_quotes: As most of the teachers focus only on the course, all of the students feel sleepy after 20 minutes, apart from some few in the front, the rest sleeps

behavior_patterns.condition: One of the students who get bored
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: wants to disrupt the class, changes the subject
related_quotes: One of the students who get bored wants to disrupt the class, changes the subject, the teacher gets angry and send the student out of the classroom
